title: Azure Mechanica title screen
description: a resource pack which changes the title screen and background. Made for a mod pack, Create:Azure Mechanica
body:
**Azure mechanica title screen** is a resource pack made for the purpose of being used in the modpack, **Create: Azure mechanica**. It changes the look of the minecraft title, as well as the background

![an image about the look of the modpack in the title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e7777566699057780805dc41b5758a969a70c1e.png)
